# Polypropylene

**Summary**: A common plastic polymer used in automotive parts and packaging.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] identified PP as a minor component of the sampled microplastics.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] PP is a significant contributor to microplastic pollution from consumer products.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] Identified via ATR-FTIR spectroscopy.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Only one particle was identified as PP. ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022, p. 52]])
